# rust-serde_toon_format0.1

## Publication status

The package is independently eligible and enabled for configured SCM COPR
publication. The canonical crates.io archive is pinned by SHA-256, fetched
directly from the immutable static registry endpoint, and includes the declared
MIT license file.

No exact `serde_toon_format 0.1.2` provider exists in Fedora 43, Fedora 44,
Rawhide, or matching RPM Fusion repositories. Fedora provides every runtime and
test dependency. The Fedora-only patch removes examples and benchmark metadata
and aligns the dev-only `rstest` dependency without changing library sources.
